results.title: Ayvalık reopens famed Byzantine wreck to divers
results.description: 1,500-year-old Byzantine shipwreck in the Yellice area of Ayvalık, locally known as “İncirli,” has been opened to recreational diving, marking a significant development for the district’s underwater tourism and maritime archaeology.

results.title: ‘Electrical non-compliances’ found at B.C. waterpark where kids were burned
results.description: A safety regulator has found "electrical non-compliances" at a British Columbia waterpark were a group of 12 schoolchildren suffered burns. The post ‘Electrical non-compliances’ found at B.C. waterpark where kids were burned appeared first on CHEK .

results.title: NFR hosts session on AI-driven railway infrastructure and track monitoring
results.description: HT Bureau GUWAHATI, June 17: Northeast Frontier Railway (NFR) organised an interactive session on the application of emerging technologies in railway infrastructure management, with a focus on improving safety, reliability and sustainability through artificial intelligence and advanced digital solutions. The programme featured a virtual presentation by noted scientist, technology expert and IIT Guwahati professor Ashwini [...]

results.title: MP Paolo says changing mindset is key to Malekula's development
results.description: Member of Parliament (MP) for Malekula, Paul Paolo, says a changing mindset among the people of Malekula is paving the way for greater economic development, as communities increasingly recognise the importance of supporting investment and infrastructure projects.

results.title: ‘Reason for hope’: Newborn calf spotted cruising with B.C.’s endangered orcas
German shepherd returned to owners after 2 months on his own
results.description: A German shepherd named Duke is back home and safe in Fitzwilliam after wandering away, living on his own for two months and finally being found in Warner.

results.title: DeSantis signs bill to push more commercial policies out of Citizens
results.description: TALLAHASSEE – Condos and commercial buildings covered by state-run Citizens Property Insurance Corp. could be more easily transferred to lightly regulated surplus lines companies under a bill signed by Gov. Ron DeSantis late Tuesday.

results.title: Downing visits site of future vet college at Rocky Vista University
results.description: Montana’s first veterinary medicine college plans to open in the summer of 2027, aiming to train students on both small and large animal care.

results.title: Physicians at Community Medical Center release statement on teleheath change
results.description: A group of seven pediatric hospitalist physicians at Community Medical Center say they are saddened by the move to a telehealth model.

results.title: Man charged with murder after Saturday shooting
results.description: HENDERSON — Authorities arrested Michael Edward Mitchell Jr., 21, on Monday in relation to a shooting on Saturday that resulted in the death of 15-year-old Manny Escobedo.

results.title: Daveigh Chase Dead At 35: Voice Of 'Lilo' And 'The Ring' Star Dies After Illness
results.description: Daveigh Chase, the former child star best known for voicing 'Lilo' in 'Lilo & Stitch' and portraying Samara Morgan in 'The Ring', has died at the young age of 35 following complications linked to meningitis and sepsis, according to reports citing her boyfriend. Fans are remembering her acclaimed career across film, television, and voice acting.
